auth.signupSubtitle: Enter your information to get started.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the login link
auth.checkEmailDesc: A confirmation link has been sent to you.
auth.googleErrorDesc: Unable to sign in with Google

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyState: No data yet. Start by adding your first entry.
dashboard.widgetAlreadyAdded: This widget is already on your dashboard.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your profile, interface, AI agents and your MVP date.
settings.savedDescription: Your preferences and profile have been updated.
settings.profileIdentityDesc: This information is used by the Content Creator agent to personalize your posts.
settings.writingStyleDesc: Paste 2-3 of your best LinkedIn posts or describe your tone (e.g., "Direct tone, short sentences, moderate emojis, always a concrete takeaway"). The content agent will clone this style.
settings.mvpDateDesc: This date powers the countdown on your Dashboard.
settings.appearanceDesc: Choose the application theme. Dark mode is recommended for the Pixel Art aesthetic.

billing.title: Subscription & Billing
billing.subscriptionSubtitle: Manage your plan, payment method and invoices.
billing.subscribedDescription: Manage your subscription and billing details.
billing.trialNotice: You are on a 14-day free trial. Subscribe to keep access after it ends.
billing.readonlyNotice: Your trial or subscription has ended. Your data is safe — subscribe to regain full access.
billing.allFeaturesIncluded: All features included — no tiers, no limits. Price varies by sign-up cohort only.
billing.paymentSecure: All payments are secured via Stripe. Your bank details are never stored on our servers.
billing.paymentEncrypted: Encrypted payment via Stripe (PCI DSS Level 1)
billing.invoiceByEmail: Invoices sent by email after each payment
billing.cancelAnytime: No commitment — cancel anytime from your Stripe portal

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this resource.

notify.heroTitle: Take the helm of your startup
notify.heroSubtitle: The AI assistant that orchestrates your data, agents, and memory.
notify.followUs: We will keep you informed about the launch. In the meantime, follow us on
notify.noSpam: No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. Data processed according to our

landing.heroTitle: Six open tools.\nZero overview.\nOne helm to steer.
landing.heroSubtitle: Helmdash gathers your finances, hypotheses, roadmap and watch in a single cockpit — steered by an agent that reads and writes directly to your data. No more copy-pasting.
landing.noCreditCard: No credit card · Notion & CSV import in 2 mins
landing.problemTitle: You're not running your business. You're chasing it.
landing.problemSubtitle: Coding alone at midnight is hard enough. The real cost is the time lost piecing together scattered info.

pains.title: Context evaporates
pains.body: Yesterday's decision is in Notion, the justifying metric in a sheet. Reconstructing takes 20 mins.

pains.title: Flying blind
pains.body: « Can we afford this? » means opening three files. So you just guess.

pains.title: No one follows up
pains.body: Competitive watch, hypothesis tracking, CRM: nothing moves unless you do it.

pains.title: AI is disconnected
pains.body: ChatGPT answers well — but cold. It has no data, no history.

landing.productTitle: A cockpit. An agent with its hands dirty.
landing.productSubtitle: The central agent reads metrics, updates hypotheses, delegates — and gives you a decision, not a wall of text.

productFeatures.title: It writes, doesn't just read
productFeatures.body: The agent updates directly in your data, with your approval.

productFeatures.title: Specialized sub-agents
productFeatures.body: Research, finance, growth: the central agent orchestrates and synthesizes.

productFeatures.title: The memory of your ship
productFeatures.body: Every decision keeps its context. You never start from scratch.

landing.transparencySubtitle: We don't promise the moon. Here are our current limits.

transparencyItems.title: No account export (yet)
transparencyItems.body: GDPR is coming. We're working on 1-click export/deletion (P0).

transparencyItems.title: Not magic AI
transparencyItems.body: Sub-agents need clear data to work well.

landing.pricingTitle: One price. In black and white.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Join the cohort. Lifetime fixed price.
landing.roadmapSubtitle: We stick to this. Nothing more.
landing.makerBody: I built Helmdash because I was going crazy opening 15 tabs just to know if my startup was hitting a wall.

faqItems.a: A group of early-adopters with a lifetime locked price.
It's encrypted and not used to train global models.

landing.footerCopyright: © 2026 Helmdash · Built by a solo founder.
